sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">PLeid.X.</title_> = chemical papyrus in <title_ TEIform="title">PLeid.</title_> (q.v.) vol. ii: reprinted in M. Berthelot, <title_ TEIform="title">Archéologie et Histoire des Sciences</title_> (Paris 1906), pp. 269-306 ( = <title_ TEIform="title">Comptes rendus des séances de l' Acad. des Sciences,</title_> tom. xlix): cited by Berthelot's sections.</item>
